Notice Of Motion To Bifurcate Issues Of Liability And Damages At Trial
Off Calendar Jan-23-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ronald Mawhinney, Esq. of Gilbert Kelly Crowley & Jennett LLP, Tel. 415.352.6408 for defendant and moving party;
Philip T. Prince, Esq. of the Law Office of Philip T. Prince, Tel. 415.981.4322 for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was discussed. The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANTs YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. and MAUNG AUNG's Motion To Bifurcate Issues Of Liability And Damages At Trial is Denied without prejudice to being re-filed for hearing before the trial judge. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
